name: Consult Playbook
description: Retrieve full details for a playbook/workflow. REQUIRED: You MUST provide the playbook_id parameter (e.g., 'story_spark'). Returns the sequence of phases and steps, which agents handle each step, input/output artifacts, completion criteria, and quality checkpoints. Use this to understand how to orchestrate a workflow.

playbook_id.description: The ID of the playbook to retrieve (e.g., 'story_spark', 'scene_weave'). See prompt for available playbook IDs.

triggers.description: Conditions that should trigger this playbook

phases.description: Ordered list of phases with steps, agents, and criteria

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the entire workflow

examples.description: Get full details for the Story Spark workflow
Get full details for the Scene Weave workflow
